title: Debug relation context that misleads search

items.text: Trace 55555555-5555-4555-8555-555555555555 includes relation_context with deprecated predicate deployment_owner pointing to a stale owner, while the selected note text says the current owner is release engineering.
Stale graph fact: deployment_owner points to the old infra group and should not drive the current answer.

answer.content: Relation context misled the search because a deprecated deployment_owner fact conflicted with the selected note text.

claims.text: A deprecated relation_context fact conflicted with the selected note text.

timeline.summary: The trace captured relation_context and selected note text for the misleading result.

prompt.content: Why did graph context point to the wrong owner?

must_include.text: A deprecated relation_context fact conflicted with the selected note text.

must_not_include: The old infra group is the current owner.

required_evidence.quote: relation_context with deprecated predicate deployment_owner pointing to a stale owner

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Suggests relation invalidation or predicate repair.

answer_correctness.criteria: Does not trust the stale owner.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.

operator_debug.root_cause: A deprecated graph relation remained visible in relation_context and conflicted with the selected note text.
operator_debug.dropped_candidate_visibility: not dropped; misleading context is visible on selected result
